scripts.build: bun build ui/main.ts --outdir dist/ui --minify && bunx tailwindcss -i ui/input.css -o dist/ui/main.css --minify && cp ui/index.html dist/ui/index.html && mkdir -p dist/ui/fonts && cp node_modules/geist/dist/fonts/geist-mono/GeistMono-Regular.woff2 dist/ui/fonts/ && cp node_modules/geist/dist/fonts/geist-mono/GeistMono-Variable.woff2 dist/ui/fonts/ && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node
